ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee's position */,
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee's progress tracking */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the office where the employee is located */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the employee */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary of the employee */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the employee */,
  "employment_date" TEXT /* Date of employment */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the employee */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee's manager */,
  "employee_status" TEXT /* Employee status (active/inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_progress_id FOREIGN KEY ("progress_id") REFERENCES progress ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_id") REFERENCES offices ("office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department associated with the position */,
  "position_description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  "job_responsibilities" TEXT /* Responsibilities of the position */,
  "required_skills" TEXT /* Required skills for the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_positions_department FOREIGN KEY ("department") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress update */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "progress_status" TEXT /* Current progress status of the employee */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the progress was updated */,
  "performance_rating" TEXT /* Performance rating of the employee */,
  "goals" TEXT /* Goals for the employee */,
  "areas_for_improvement" TEXT /* Areas for improvement for the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offices" (
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each office */,
  "office_name" TEXT /* Name of the office */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the office */,
  "office_address" TEXT /* Address of the office */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the office */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the office */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "head_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department head */,
  "department_description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "action_name" TEXT /* Name of the action (e.g., View, Edit, Delete) */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_actions" (
  "employee_action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action performed on an employee record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "action_id" INTEGER /* ID of the action performed */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "action_comments" TEXT /* Comments about the action performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_actions_action_id FOREIGN KEY ("action_id") REFERENCES actions ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_actions_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user role */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action_id" INTEGER /* ID of the action performed */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the action performed */,
  "log_comments" TEXT /* Comments about the action performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_action_id FOREIGN KEY ("action_id") REFERENCES actions ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salary_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary change */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "old_salary" REAL /* Old salary before the change */,
  "new_salary" REAL /* New salary after the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the salary was changed */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the salary change */,
  "change_comments" TEXT /* Comments about the salary change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_changes_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
